project_type: Python CLI + FastAPI web app, multi-agent investment analysis system
test_framework: pytest with click.testing.CliRunner for CLI tests, httpx/TestClient for API tests
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e . 2. pytest tests/ -x -q 3. augur report AAPL --pe 25 (verify report output)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11 available. No Docker needed for tests.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns in cli.py for CLI commands, api.py for endpoints. Use Chinese for report content.
key_patterns: CLI uses Click groups (main), API uses FastAPI with get_registry()/get_coordinator() singletons. Agents produce AgentResponse with signal/score/confidence/key_findings/risks/reasoning. DecisionCoordinator.analyze_with_all() returns Dict[str, AgentResponse], get_consensus() returns AgentResponse with metadata including position_sizing. Dashboard uses Jinja2 templates in dashboard/templates/.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - main package (cli.py, api.py, registry.py, personas/), dashboard/ - FastAPI web app with templates/, tests/ - pytest tests, cases/analysis-reports/ - example report format
